title: Security Report Quality Gate v1
source_summary: Immunefi report guidance requires thorough, detailed reports, economic-damage articulation, and complete runnable PoCs.
Immunefi platform rules prohibit mainnet/public-testnet testing, misrepresenting scope/severity/impact, duplicate submissions, placeholder reports, and incomplete PoCs where required.
Immunefi severity v2.3 is impact-centered and may downgrade or reject bugs with elevated privileges or uncommon user interaction.
Optimism program-specific rules, known issues, assets, and out-of-scope rows must be checked before any candidate moves forward.
blocked_until: candidate-specific report draft passes all required gates
exact security_report_submission_gate approval exists before any external submission
next_action: Build optimism_local_review_candidate_filter_v1 from the Optimism asset table, duplicate matrix, and this report-quality gate.
